post.summary: Create web session token using phone OTP
post.description: Tenant is resolved only from the HTTP `Host` (and `x-forwarded-host` when trusted): `{slug}.{TENANT_ROOT_DOMAIN}`. This endpoint is introduced for parallel phone+OTP auth migration.

403.description: TENANT_CONTEXT_MISSING, TENANT_SCOPE_FORBIDDEN (no membership), or invalid credentials

404.description: TENANT_HOST_UNKNOWN — slug has no matching tenant row

post.description: Same Host-based tenant resolution as web login. Telegram proof is in `telegram_init_payload`; tenant scope comes only from `request.tenant`.

get.summary: List workspaces for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns tenant memberships from user_tenants joined to tenants (non-deleted). Uses a tightly scoped read path with explicit user-bound constraints.

200.description: Active memberships for the current user

post.description: Creates a new workspace tenant with the provided name/subdomain and assigns the authenticated user as owner.

200.description: Workspace created and owner membership assigned

403.description: Tenant context or membership constraints failed

post.summary: Issue session JWT for a workspace tenant
post.description: Uses JWT `sub` as the user, verifies membership via user_tenants, and returns a new access token scoped to the requested tenant_id and role. When the HTTP Host resolves to a workspace tenant, `tenant_id` must match that host tenant.

200.description: New web session token for the selected tenant

403.description: HTTP 403 — authenticated user is not a member of the requested tenant_id

404.description: User membership not found in tenant

patch.summary: Change user role in tenant scope
patch.description: General role update: cannot change your own role, cannot assign or modify `owner` here, and actor must outrank target and new role. Success bumps `session_version` on the target membership so older JWTs for that user+tenant fail with `AUTH_TOKEN_REVOKED`. RBAC denial codes: RBAC_SELF_ROLE_CHANGE_FORBIDDEN, RBAC_OWNER_ROLE_ASSIGNMENT_FORBIDDEN, RBAC_PROTECTED_ROLE_MODIFICATION_FORBIDDEN, RBAC_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE_PRIVILEGE.

403.description: Insufficient JWT role, tenant context, or workspace RBAC policy (see operation description for codes)

404.description: User membership not found in tenant

delete.description: Explicitly unsupported in this API. Membership and ownership flows are controlled separately.

405.description: Direct user deletion is not supported

patch.summary: Bulk change user roles in tenant scope
patch.description: Bulk general role update under tenant scope. Each target is evaluated with the same PATCH RBAC policy (no self change, no owner modification/assignment, actor must outrank target and new role). Runs in a single transaction and bumps `session_version` only for memberships whose role actually changes.

403.description: Insufficient JWT role, tenant context, or workspace RBAC policy (see operation description for policy constraints)

404.description: One or more user memberships not found in tenant

404.description: User membership not found in tenant

403.description: Insufficient role or policy violation (self/owner removal forbidden)

phone.description: Phone number used for OTP login (digits and optional leading +; spaces stripped)

invite_token.description: Optional workspace invite token for invite onboarding continuity

requires_registration.description: When true, OTP verification succeeded but account completion is required before issuing a session

onboarding_token.description: Short-lived onboarding token used by registration completion endpoint

phone.description: Phone number to classify for auth onboarding flow

invite_token.description: Optional workspace invite token if user arrived through invite link

onboarding_token.description: Short-lived onboarding token returned after OTP verification for unknown phone

telegram_init_payload.description: Telegram init data payload from Telegram WebApp

tenant_subdomain.description: Workspace hostname label (`tenants.subdomain`); empty when unset. Used for Host-aligned workspace switches.

session_version.description: Membership session version (JWT `sess_ver` must match for this tenant)

tenant_id.description: Target tenant; caller must have an active user_tenants row for this tenant.

link_reason.example: User requested account linking from profile settings

isPhoneVerified.description: Phone verification flag for OTP-capable accounts.

lastLoginAt.description: Last successful login timestamp when available.

invitedAt.description: Timestamp when invite was issued for membership.

nextCursor.description: Opaque cursor for the next page; null when no more rows

userIds.description: Tenant-scoped target user IDs for bulk role update.

role.description: New tenant-scoped role for all target users. The `owner` role cannot be assigned here; only changed memberships bump `session_version`.
New tenant-scoped role for the target user. The `owner` role cannot be assigned here; successful updates bump `user_tenants.session_version`, invalidating prior JWTs for that membership (`sess_ver`).

newOwnerUserId.description: Existing active workspace member that will become the new owner.

description.example: A two-day nature tour for members.

tripDetails.description: Structured trip details (JSON). On create, the payload is persisted as given (no prior document to merge). Separate from `description` marketing text.

description.example: A two-day nature tour for members.

autoAcceptRegistrations.description: When false, registrations are not auto-accepted by tour policy.

tourType.description: Optional tour classification for specialized UX.

primaryTransportMode.description: Primary transport mode for the tour.

tripDetails.description: Structured trip details (JSONB). Separate from tour `description`.

Structured trip details (JSON). Patches are deep-merged into the stored document (omit a key to leave it unchanged; arrays replace when sent). Pass root `null` to clear the whole blob. Separate from `description` marketing text.

paymentStatus.description: Persisted aggregate status (full entity enum). PATCH `/payment` accepts only NotPaid, Partial, Paid.

telegramUserId.description: Telegram user id; required when entryMode is telegram

vehicleSeatCapacity.description: Optional vehicle seat capacity if participant is driver

telegramUserId.description: Telegram user id; required when entryMode is telegram

tourId.description: Tour to register for (booking is tied directly to the tour)
